title: Muthoot Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Muthoot Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!
